scripts.dist: CSC_NAME="${KIOSK_SIGN_IDENTITY:-PhotoBooth Local Code Signing}" electron-vite build && CSC_NAME="${KIOSK_SIGN_IDENTITY:-PhotoBooth Local Code Signing}" electron-builder --publish never && node scripts/rename-with-hash.cjs --version=$npm_package_version
scripts.dist:full: CSC_NAME="${KIOSK_SIGN_IDENTITY:-PhotoBooth Local Code Signing}" electron-vite build && CSC_NAME="${KIOSK_SIGN_IDENTITY:-PhotoBooth Local Code Signing}" electron-builder --publish never -c.npmRebuild=true && node scripts/rename-with-hash.cjs --version=$npm_package_version
scripts.dist:adhoc: CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-vite build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --publish never && node scripts/rename-with-hash.cjs --version=$npm_package_version
scripts.dist:full:adhoc: CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-vite build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --publish never -c.npmRebuild=true && node scripts/rename-with-hash.cjs --version=$npm_package_version

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Photo Booth needs camera access to take photos.
